last_comments: Implemented the G1-03 doctor-policy hardening. `DX005` unpaired marker drift and `DX027` raw controller form parsing are now blocking errors, and `DX020` module-isolation violations are no longer suppressible through the temporary allowlist file. Updated CLI/architecture docs to reflect the stricter `ship doctor` contract. Verification: `go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/policies`; `go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/policies -run 'TestRunDoctorChecks_(MarkerIntegrity|ContractUsage|BoundaryImports)|TestDoctorCommand_(IntegrationFixture|JSONOutput)'`; `docket validate TKT-260`; `docket validate TKT-196`.
